status_quo: If readmission rates are understated by even 2%, we risk CMS penalties exceeding $500K annually and board-level compliance exposure.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ's audit surfaced 3 findings and enabled targeted remediation that improved the reliability score from 31 to 81.
headline_finding: Reported readmission_rate for 2025-12 is 13.0%, but recomputed value from raw events is 12.3%. Discrepancy of +5.7%.
